name: se-shared-evidence-claim-sensitive
title: Make shared evidence rules claim-sensitive
description: Snapshot 4e4619ac8aab4220a5390e039393b8f58a5af36f34e44efe30be85ac498cd968; findings 1.1.1 and 1.1.2. Replace universal 12-month staleness and unconditional two-source verification with claim-sensitive rules while preserving dating, corroboration, disconfirmation, and conservative failure handling. Affected templates: templates/skills/_shared/references/source-standards.md and templates/skills/_shared/references/verification-protocol.md.
creator: sdelmas
